hooks.command:
if [ "${CLAUDE_CODE_TOOLKIT_CRON_MODE:-0}" = "1" ]; then mkdir -p "${HOME}/.claude-code-toolkit/audit" && printf '{"ts":"%s","hook":"PreToolUse","matcher":"mcp__notion__create_page","mode":"cron_bypass"}
' "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> "${HOME}/.claude-code-toolkit/audit/decision-log-$(date -u +%Y-%m-%d).jsonl"; exit 0; fi; printf '
[claude-code-toolkit] decision-log-keeper는 Notion DB row를 추가하려 합니다.
  bypass: CLAUDE_CODE_TOOLKIT_CRON_MODE=1
계속하려면 Enter, 취소는 Ctrl+C: ' >&2 && read -r _ </dev/tty
